title: matelea hastata
intro: Matelea hastata is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as dogbane. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Matelea hastata include relief from pain, reduction of swelling, and promotion of wound healing. Herbal preparations of Matelea hastata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
